R.0 + (x - a) * polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n) = (x - a) * polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n)

polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, m) = polynomial_eval(q, x)

proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0) { exists(k0: Polynomial[T0]) { polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness[T0](x0, x1, k0) } = polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_polynomial[T0](x0, x1) }[R](p, a)
